sections.title: 2022 Amendment
sections.text: Following decisions taken at the Forty-fifth Session of the Codex Alimentarius Commission in December 2022, amendments were made in Section 8.2 Labelling of non-retail containers.
sections.retrieval_text:
2022 Amendment
level=1
Following decisions taken at the Forty-fifth Session of the Codex Alimentarius Commission in December 2022, amendments were made in Section 8.2 Labelling of non-retail containers.

page_spans.text: Following decisions taken at the Forty-fifth Session of the Codex Alimentarius Commission in December 2022, amendments were made in Section 8.2 Labelling of non-retail containers.

sections.title: SCOPE
sections.text: This standard applies to the product known as kimchi, as defined in Section 2 below, which is prepared with Chinese cabbage as a predominant ingredient and other vegetables which have been trimmed, cut, salted and seasoned before fermentation.
sections.retrieval_text:
SCOPE
number=1
level=1
This standard applies to the product known as kimchi, as defined in Section 2 below, which is prepared with Chinese cabbage as a predominant ingredient and other vegetables which have been trimmed, cut, salted and seasoned before fermentation.

page_spans.text: This standard applies to the product known as kimchi, as defined in Section 2 below, which is prepared with Chinese cabbage as a predominant ingredient and other vegetables which have been trimmed, cut, salted and seasoned before fermentation.

sections.title: DESCRIPTION
sections.retrieval_text:
DESCRIPTION
number=2
level=1

sections.title: ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS
sections.retrieval_text:
ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS
number=3
level=1

sections.title: Product definition
sections.text:
Kimchi is the product:
(a) prepared from varieties of Chinese cabbage, Brassica pekinensis Rupr.; such Chinese cabbages shall be free from significant defects, and trimmed to remove inedible parts, salted, washed with fresh water, and drained to remove excess water; they may or may not be cut into suitable sized pieces/parts;
(b) processed with seasoning mixture mainly consisting of red pepper ( Capsicum annuum  L.) powder, garlic, ginger, edible allium varieties other than garlic, and radish. These ingredients may be chopped, sliced and broken into pieces; and
(c) fermented before or after being packaged into appropriate containers to ensure the proper ripening and preservation of the product by lactic acid production at low temperatures.
sections.retrieval_text:
DESCRIPTION > Product definition
number=2.1
level=2
Kimchi is the product:
(a) prepared from varieties of Chinese cabbage, Brassica pekinensis Rupr.; such Chinese cabbages shall be free from significant defects, and trimmed to remove inedible parts, salted, washed with fresh water, and drained to remove excess water; they may or may not be cut into suitable sized pieces/parts;
(b) processed with seasoning mixture mainly consisting of red pepper ( Capsicum annuum  L.) powder, garlic, ginger, edible allium varieties other than garlic, and radish. These ingredients may be chopped, sliced and broken into pieces; and
(c) fermented before or after being packaged into appropriate containers to ensure the proper ripening and preservation of the product by lactic acid production at low temperatures.

page_spans.text:
Kimchi is the product:
(a) prepared from varieties of Chinese cabbage, Brassica pekinensis Rupr.; such Chinese cabbages shall be free from significant defects, and trimmed to remove inedible parts, salted, washed with fresh water, and drained to remove excess water; they may or may not be cut into suitable sized pieces/parts;
(b) processed with seasoning mixture mainly consisting of red pepper ( Capsicum annuum  L.) powder, garlic, ginger, edible allium varieties other than garlic, and radish. These ingredients may be chopped, sliced and broken into pieces; and
(c) fermented before or after being packaged into appropriate containers to ensure the proper ripening and preservation of the product by lactic acid production at low temperatures.

sections.title: Styles
sections.retrieval_text:
DESCRIPTION > Styles
number=2.2
level=2
The product should be presented in one of the following styles:
(a) whole – whole Chinese cabbage;
(b) halves – Chinese cabbages divided lengthwise into halves;
(c) quarters – Chinese cabbages divided lengthwise into quarters; and
(d) slices or chips – Chinese cabbage leaves cut into pieces of 1~6 cm in length and width.

sections.title: HYGIENE
sections.text: 6.1 It is recommended that the product covered by the provisions of this standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CXC 1-1969) and other relevant Codex texts such as codes of hygienic practice and codes of practice. 6.2 The product should comply with any microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles and Guidelines for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria Related to Foods (CXG 21-1997).

sections.title: Other quality criteria
sections.text: (a) Colour – The product should have red colour originating from red pepper. (b) Taste – The product should have a hot and salty taste. It may also have a sour taste. (c) Texture – The product should be reasonably firm, crisp, and chewy.

sections.title: Labelling of non-retail containers
sections.text: The labelling of non-retail containers should be in accordance with the General Standard for the Labelling of Non-Retail Containers of Foods (CXS 346-2021).

sections.title: Minimum drained weight
sections.text: The drained weight of the final  product, as a percent age of the indicated weight, should be not less than 80 percent by weight, calculated on the basis of the weight of distilled water at 20 oC which the sealed container will hold when completely filled. The drained weight of the final product as a percentage by the indicated weight shall not be less than 80 percent by weight.

sentences.original: The product covered by the provisions of this standard shall be labelled in accordance with the General Standard for the Labelling of Pre-packaged Foods (CXS 1-1985).

classification.sentence: In addition, the following specific provisions apply:
classification.pattern: Introductory phrase + declarative statement indicating applicability of provisions
classification.justification: The sentence imposes an obligation by stating that certain provisions apply. Its structure is an introductory phrase followed by a declarative statement. Since no known templates exist and the sentence does not fit typical modal verbs or conditional structures, it is classified as a new pattern with obligation modality and imposition communicative function.
notes: The sentence is an introductory clause serving to announce subsequent obligations, without explicit modal verbs.

sentences.original: In addition, the following specific provisions apply:

pages.title: STANDARD FOR KIMCHI
pages.summary: Página inicial do documento com título principal 'STANDARD FOR KIMCHI' e cabeçalho 'CXS 223-2001'. Nenhuma seção ou texto estrutural detectado além do cabeçalho e título principais. Sem estrutura hierárquica nesta página.

Esta página contém um cabeçalho 'CXS 223-2001' e uma seção principal não numerada '2022 Amendment' com texto associado. Não há continuidade detectada com a página anterior nem indicações de continuação para a próxima página.

A página contém o cabeçalho 'CXS 223-2001 3' e apresenta três seções principais numeradas 1, 2 e 3. A seção 2 possui dois subtítulos (2.1 e 2.2) e a seção 3 possui duas subseções (3.1 e 3.2), sendo que 3.1 tem três subsubseções (3.1.1, 3.1.2 e 3.1.3). O texto está associado corretamente aos respectivos títulos, não havendo continuidade detectada com a página anterior nem indicação de continuação para a próxima página.

A página apresenta a continuação da subseção 3.2.1 iniciada na página anterior com critérios de qualidade detalhados. Introduz a seção 4 FOOD ADDITIVES com vários subtítulos numerados (4.1 a 4.5) listando aditivos alimentares e seus níveis máximos. Também estão presentes as seções 5 CONTAMINANTS e 6 HYGIENE, cada uma com seus respectivos textos explicativos. Não há indícios de continuação para páginas seguintes.

A página possui as seções 7 WEIGHTS AND MEASURES com subtítulos 7.1 e 7.1.1, 8 LABELLING com subtítulos 8.1 e 8.2, e 9 METHODS OF ANALYSIS AND SAMPLING, com seus respectivos textos associados de forma limpa, e sem indicações de continuidade para outras páginas.
